reviews.comment:
Me toco pasar a la mañana temprano. El playero no tenía un muy buen día aparentemente. No tienen servicio de pago electrónico, y cuando manifestamos que no solemos viajar con efectivo y que solo manejamos medios de pago electrónicos nos respondieron: "yo no soy el encargado, yo no pongo las reglas, no hay sistema" . Lamentable. En el servicompras nos atendieron super, y si había sistema.. Medio raro.

(Translated by Google)
I had to go early in the morning. The beach attendant wasn't having a very good day, apparently. They don't have an electronic payment service, and when we explained that we don't usually travel with cash and only use electronic payment methods, they responded: "I'm not in charge, I don't make the rules, there's no system." It's pathetic. At the grocery store, they treated us wonderfully, and there was a system... Kind of weird.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdnV2OFhREAE
